dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome.title: Welcome to IMMU!
dashboard.welcome.subtitle: Your profile is complete and your personalized AIP journey is ready.
dashboard.symptoms.empty: Log your first day to start tracking your symptoms. You can log your symptom severity daily and watch how they improve over time.
dashboard.wellness.empty: Log your first day to start tracking your wellness score over time. Your score is calculated from your mood, sleep quality, and stress levels.
dashboard.weight.empty: Start tracking your weight to see how your body responds to the AIP diet. Log your weight regularly to see trends over time.
dashboard.observations.title: Daily Observations
dashboard.observations.logFirst: Log your symptoms to see daily insights.
dashboard.observations.noInsights: No insights for today. Try logging your symptoms and wellness data.
dashboard.todo.title: Daily To-Do List
dashboard.todo.subtitle: Check off items as you complete them throughout the day
foodList.title: Food List
foodList.reintroductionBanner: You're in the Reintroduction Phase. All products are set to Under evaluation — use the dropdown on each item to mark what works for you.
nutrition.title: Nutrition Guides
nutrition.subtitle: Select your stage in the protocol to see the guidelines tailored to you. Learn the rules, explore your food options, and start your journey toward better health.
nutrition.adaptation.title: Adaptation phase
nutrition.adaptation.subtitle: A gentle 28-day reset to say goodbye to old habits and welcome fiber-rich foods at your own pace.
nutrition.elimination.title: Elimination phase
nutrition.elimination.subtitle: Remove triggers to find what works for you.
nutrition.reintroduction.title: Reintroduction phase
nutrition.reintroduction.subtitle: Gradually add foods back to test your body's response.
nutrition.adaptationPhase.heading: Adaptation Phase
nutrition.eliminationPhase.heading: Elimination Phase
nutrition.reintroductionPhase.heading: Reintroduction Phase
logDay.title: Log Your Day
logDay.notes.placeholder: Any additional notes about your day...
logDay.restart.title: Restart Your Diet?
logDay.restart.description: AIP allows zero exceptions during elimination. To get accurate results, restart from Day 1.
calendar.title: Calendar
profile.title: Your Profile
profile.delete.title: Delete Account?
profile.delete.description: This will permanently delete your account and all your data including logs, symptoms, and conditions. This action cannot be undone.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
onboarding.about.title: About You
onboarding.about.subtitle: Please enter some basic information to personalize your experience.
onboarding.conditions.title: What conditions are you managing?
onboarding.symptoms.title: What symptoms are you experiencing?
onboarding.timeline.title: Diet Timeline
onboarding.adaptation.title: Adaptation Period
weightModal.title: Log Weight
